sources.description: this deployment's own front page (index.html): the submission's argument, restated as the definitional and app-behavior claims the page itself stipulates or already grounds elsewhere in this kernel

the epistack submission repository's own docs and corpora (docs/the-minimum-constitution.md, docs/criteria-to-architecture-map.md, docs/the-tcpip-counterexample.md, docs/the-asymmetric-weapon.md, docs/contract-register.md, corpora/lineage), cited by the front page's own doors; these claims enter at the honest floor a citation alone ever earns, awaiting a local fork that would type them

_note: adopts measurement (shared with kernel/governance, so the mirrored governance claims restatement links target keep their identity) plus the two common kinds the front page's own decomposition actually needs: declaration (ceiling constitutive, definitional statements) and forum (ceiling corroborated, interpretive weighings). No local kind: every kind here is a shared common bundle from corpora/_shared/common-types.js.
